title: AggregatedPortfolioInstrumentAggregate
description: Aggregated data across all positions for a single instrument.

assetCurrency.description: ISO 4217 code of the instrument's base currency (e.g. 'USD', 'EUR').

totalMarginAccountCurrency.description: Sum of margins across all positions for this instrument, in account currency.

totalFees.description: Sum of transaction fees taken on positions of this instrument, in asset currency.

totalFeesAcctCcy.description: Sum of transaction fees taken on positions of this instrument, in account currency.

totalTaxes.description: Sum of taxes for this instrument, in asset currency.

totalTaxesAcctCcy.description: Sum of taxes for this instrument, in account currency.

totalMarginAssetCurrency.description: Sum of margins across all positions for this instrument, in asset currency.

pnlAssetCurrency.description: Unrealized P&L for this instrument in asset currency. Null when P&L calculation is not requested.

accountCurrencyRoePercent.description: Return on equity in account currency: accountCurrencyReturn / totalMarginAccountCurrency.

netContracts.description: Net contracts across all positions (positive = net long, negative = net short).

netUnits.description: Net units across all positions (positive = net long, negative = net short).

netCurrentExposureAssetCurrency.description: Net current market exposure in asset currency.

netCurrentExposureAccountCurrency.description: Net current market exposure in account currency.

netInitialExposureAccountCurrency.description: Net initial exposure at open in account currency.

accountCurrencyReturn.description: Unrealized P&L for this instrument in account currency.

liquidationValueAccountCurrency.description: Current liquidation value in account currency: totalMarginAccountCurrency + accountCurrencyReturn.

liquidationValueAssetCurrency.description: Current liquidation value in asset currency.

avgLeverage.description: Average leverage across all positions for this instrument.

avgOpenRate.description: Weighted average open rate across all positions for this instrument.

netAvgOpenRate.description: Direction-aware weighted average open rate (long contributions minus short).

avgConversionRate.description: Weighted average asset-to-account-currency conversion rate at position open.
